title: Dev v0.5.9 Feedback Sidebar Button Fix
notes:
Moves Feedback into the left helper sidebar as a proper screen and removes the bad loose feedback placement.

Changes:
- Adds Feedback / Bug Report button to the left sidebar.
- Removes old feedbackView placement.
- Adds real tab-feedback page.
- Clicking Feedback / Bug Report opens the feedback screen.
- Feedback button highlights when active.
- Keeps Dev v0.5.7/v0.5.8 feedback submit behavior.
- Keeps Submit Feedback to Master, Save Settings, Load Settings, Clear Token.
